svg.title: Flow Meter Mount Bracket - Orthographic Drawing
svg.desc: Three-view orthographic projection of the flow meter mount bracket. Scale: 5 px/mm. All dimensions in mm. Bracket: 70W x 40D x 35H mm (PETG/ABS, 3D printed). Holds DIGITEN 1/4" QC flow sensor (63.5L x 30.5W x 38.1H mm). Front view (looking along -Y): X horizontal, Z vertical. Side view (looking along -X): Y horizontal, Z vertical. Top view (looking along -Z): X horizontal, Y vertical.
svg.text: Scale 5 px/mm | Dims in mm | PETG/ABS 3D print | Holds DIGITEN 1/4" QC flow sensor

g.text: front (Y=0) at top; back wall side (Y=40) at bottom
4. Two M3 x 8mm SHCS into heat-set inserts in enclosure floor
5. Clip tabs retain sensor; flex outward for insertion
6. Sensor: DIGITEN 1/4" QC hall-effect flow sensor (63.5 x 30.5 x 38.1mm)
7. QC ports face left/right (X axis) toward inlet/outlet bulkheads
8. Signal cable (3-wire) exits sensor top, routes up back wall
